title: biophytum albiflorum
intro: Biophytum albiflorum, also known as the 'Tulsi of the Mountains' or 'False Tulsi', is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is valued for its numerous health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of Biophytum albiflorum include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
